audit_items.proof_trace: The balance check at lines 437-440 (`IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))`) is unconditional and precedes the transfer at line 444; between these two operations only a `view` computation and a read-only oracle call (`latestRoundData`) execute, neither of which can affect the ERC20 balance. The reentrancy guard (`s_entered`) prevents any recursive `bid()` call from draining the balance during the callback at line 449, which fires after the transfer already succeeded.
